summary: A high-severity forklift hydraulic leak at dock 2 has blocked the loading lane, halting all pallet movement. A technician has been dispatched, dock 2 operations notified, and the event logged. Planned tasks include escalating to the operations manager if the blockage persists, notifying the logistics team about potential shipment schedule impacts, and resolving the incident once the loading lane is clear. [Resolved in field: worker_6 @ t=1022: hydraulic leak contained and loading lane reopened] [Resolved in field: worker_2 @ t=1026: dock 2 forklift issue resolved now]
